Irradiation time was 30 min. The first
measurement was carried out 2-5 h after the end of
bombardment; the second measurement was carried out on
the next day. Two measurements were made for each
target foil at calibrated distances of 6 cm and 11.5
cm. The dead time of measurements did not exceed 10 %.
The measured excitation functions were compared
with the data from TENDL-2023 library.
Entry was approved by Dr. I.A.Khomenko.
